title: Wait Till Helen Comes
overview: After a reconstructed family moves to a converted church in the country, 14-year-old Molly, must save her new troubled step-sister from a dangerous relationship with the desperate ghost of a young girl.  Based on the best selling novel by Mary Downing Hahn.
